title: Ad hoc support to support single port memory

features.name: single_port_ram_with_shared_read_write_address
features.description: Code should include a single-port RAM module where read and write operations use the same address port, controlled by a write enable signal

features.name: bram_rules_force_single_port_directive
features.description: Code should include a BRAM rules file with force_single_port directive to enable single-port memory handling
features.snippet:
bram sram_1rw_16b_16w_1bank_freepdk45
init 0
abits 4
dbits 16
ports 1 1
wrmode 1 0
endbram
match sram_1rw_16b_16w_1bank_freepdk45
force_single_port
endmatch

features.name: memory_array_with_unpacked_dimension
features.description: Code should include a memory array using unpacked dimension syntax for BRAM inference
